description: ZTOLE-mode-1 convergence measurement on the 8 disputed vocab chips. Tests whether panel models converge on a single opcode (false gap — reduces to existing) OR diverge (true vocab gap — no existing opcode captures intent).

inputs.note: Tests R:OPEN gap. False=converges to R:STOP / R:UNLOCK / etc. True=panel picks R:OPEN unanimously OR diverges.
Tests R:START gap. Could reduce to R:DRVE/R:THR/R:TKOF for vehicle context.
Tests R:CLOSE. I claim it reduces to R:STOP. ZTOLE verifies.
Tests R:LOCK. I claim it reduces to R:STOP. ZTOLE verifies.

inputs.nl: broadcast my position to all peers
inputs.note: Tests L:SEND. I claim it reduces to D:PUSH or G:POS@*. ZTOLE verifies.
Tests V:CSPOS (loader bug — opcode IS in v15 CSV but not loaded as Tier 2).
Tests E:VIB gap. No existing E-opcode captures vibration.
Tests D:DEL gap. D:ABORT exists for processes. ZTOLE checks if models reduce or diverge.
